title: Assertion: column not found
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a (id Int32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE b (id Int32, score Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT a.id, a.value, b.score FROM a LEFT JOIN b ON a.id = b.id WHERE b.score IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Using non-existent column in SELECT statement
